description: OmniCoder per-phase model routing presets. Edit ~/.omnicoder/routing-presets.json to add your own. The `agent` block is merged into ~/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc (or %APPDATA%\opencode\opencode.jsonc on Windows) by `omnicoder-routing apply <preset>`.

default.description: No per-agent overrides. Whatever you pick in the TUI (/models, Tab) sticks across build / plan / general. Use this unless you want different models for different phases.

balanced.description: Sonnet for plan & general (quality-sensitive), Haiku for build (token-heavy, tight feedback loop). Good default when you have Anthropic credits.

quality.description: Opus for plan (the one step that benefits most from reasoning), Sonnet for build & general. Most expensive, but keeps architecture decisions sharp.

cheap.description: Sonnet only for plan, Haiku for everything else. Minimises tokens while still getting a smart upfront plan.

nim-free.description: NVIDIA NIM MiniMax M2.7 for every phase. Free tier, 40 rpm. Good when you're out of paid credits.

minimax-paid.description: MiniMax M2 via Anthropic-compat endpoint (prompt caching for 90% off on cache hits).

mixed-nim-anthropic.description: Anthropic Sonnet/Opus for plan (better reasoning), NVIDIA NIM MiniMax for build (free bulk tokens). Best value if you have both keys.
